steps.title: Include both chain endpoints
steps.content: An overview of the matsutake commodity chain must show how the chain connects production and purchase. The notes identify the endpoints: mushroom pickers in Oregon and wealthy consumers buying costly matsutake in Japan. The overview should also reflect that this is the contemporary chain studied by Mei Chen, not merely a definition of commodity chains in general.

steps.title: Reject partial overviews
steps.content: A focuses on the chain's origin in the 1980s without showing its present endpoints. B defines commodity chains generally without describing the matsutake chain specifically. D gives only the consumer endpoint in Japan and omits the Oregon pickers, so it is incomplete. The answer is C.
